# Wisebox

> One secure place for diaspora families to track documents, monitor property readiness, and coordinate expert help — specifically for properties in Bangladesh.

## What Wisebox does

Wisebox helps families living abroad (US, UK, Canada, Australia) manage ancestral properties back in Bangladesh. The core problems it solves:

- Property documents (deeds, tax clearances, legal correspondence) are scattered across WhatsApp groups, emails, and paper files
- Families have no visibility into the status or readiness of their properties
- Finding and coordinating trusted consultants (lawyers, land surveyors, agents) is opaque and risky
- Cross-border collaboration between family members and local consultants is difficult to track

## Core features

- **Document vault**: Versioned, time-stamped storage for all property records
- **Readiness score**: Automated assessment of a property's legal and administrative health
- **Consultant workflows**: Connect with licensed consultants; all requests become trackable tickets
- **Smart alerts**: Real-time status updates, action items, and deadline reminders
- **Family collaboration**: Invite family members with role-based access

## Who it's for

Bangladeshi diaspora families who own land or property back home and need a structured, digital way to manage it from abroad. Also useful for NRBs (Non-Resident Bangladeshis) with inheritance, dispute, or compliance needs.

## Key stats

- 15 minutes average time to complete a first property assessment
- 72% average readiness score improvement after 30 days
- Families from 4 countries: US, UK, Canada, Australia
- Offices in Washington DC, Uppsala, and Dhaka
